title: senecio angustatus
intro: Senecio angustatus, also known as narrow-leaf groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio angustatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
